description_long: This is a small, round container with a reddish-brown body and a matching lid, designed for holding lotion. The lid features a white label with blue text, prominently displaying the words 'Ondüla Sun' and additional product information in smaller print. The side of the container also has a white label with blue text, wrapping partially around the circumference. The container appears to be made of plastic, with a smooth, matte finish. The cap is likely screw-on, providing a secure closure for the contents inside. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, with minimal graphic elements aside from the text.
description: A round, reddish-brown plastic lotion container with a white and blue labeled screw-on lid and side label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label 'Ondüla Sun' on the lid and the side label with product details.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the plain reddish-brown body and the edge of the lid label.
description_view_2: Rear view showing mostly the plain reddish-brown surface with minimal label visibility.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the edge of the main label and a partial view of the side label.
